sentences.arabic: خَطَّطَ الأَصْدِقَاءُ لِمُفَاجَأَةِ تَامِرٍ بِعِيدِ مِيلَادِهِ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelji su planirali iznenađenje za Tamira na rođendan.
sentences.translationEn: The friends planned a surprise for Tamer's birthday.

sentences.arabic: تَكَلَّمُوا بِصَوْتٍ هَادِئٍ حَتَّى لَا يَسْمَعَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Govorili su tiho da ih ne čuje.
sentences.translationEn: They spoke quietly so he wouldn't hear them.

sentences.translation: Ukrasili su sobu i kupili tortu.
sentences.translationEn: They decorated the room and bought the cake.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا دَخَلَ تَامِرٌ صَرَخُوا «عِيدَ مِيلَادٍ سَعِيدٍ».
sentences.translation: Kada je Tamir ušao, vikali su «Sretan rođendan».
sentences.translationEn: When Tamer entered, they shouted «Happy Birthday».
